_comment: PRODUCTION genesis renderer on Ethereum mainnet (chainId 1) — fully on-chain art + traits for the live tinydinos ERC-721 (0xd9b78a2f1dafc8bb9c60961790d2beefebee56f4). Deployed via the Bankr managed wallet using a DinoDeployer helper through the canonical CREATE2 proxy (Bankr cannot send raw creation txs). Storage sealed/ownerless; renderer has no owner by construction. NOT yet repointed: setBaseURI on the live 721 must be run by its owner (0xde7fce3a1cba4a705f299ce41d163017f165d666).
verified: pre-seal: all 11 SSTORE2 blobs byte-identical to build/out (58,136 bytes). post-seal live: 9/9 sampled tokens (incl. 1600x1600 outliers, worst-case #8891, 1/1 #10001) svg+json hash-exact vs fixtures; 12/12 sampled traitRGBA exact; w3link gateway resolves worst-case in ~0.7s (HTTP 200, raw JSON).

abandoned._comment: First attempt, unsealed and unreferenced (a token chunk was double-applied when a client-side timeout hid a landed tx). Harmless orphan.
